intro: Metabasis cretensis, also known as Cretan metabasis, is a plant species native to the island of Crete in Greece, belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer, cardiovascular disease, and neurodegenerative disorders. The bioactive constituents of Metabasis cretensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Metabasis cretensis is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
